text: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 and start with a glass of water. After that, I do a 20-minute yoga session to stretch and feel energized. I have a simple breakfast of oatmeal with fruit before leaving for work at 8:00. My work schedule is quite consistent: I usually finish at 5:00 PM, and I try to keep the same routine each day. In the evening, I either go for a run or take a walk to stay active. After dinner, I relax by reading a book or watching a series, and I’m always in bed by 10:30 PM. This consistency helps me feel balanced and productive.
